SELECT user_id
        FROM conversation_origin
        WHERE SST2TestMuti(comment)=0
        AND Resnet18TestMuti(image)=0;

SELECT *
        FROM conversation_origin
        WHERE datetime < '2024-06-30'
        AND SST2TestMuti(comment)=0;
